NodeNotes Unfortunately, the video on the Intel site fails, see Edison Node Install Fail See https://communities.intel.com/thread/77894 Below are instructions for how to install Node on the Signpost image: Get the x86 (32-bit) version wget --no-check

mage: Get the x86 (32-bit) version wget --no-check-certificate https: // nodejs.org / dist / v6.9.5 / node-v6.9.5-linux-x86.tar.gz [$[Get Code]] If you get a certificate error about the time, the set the time to within the boundaries of the certifica

the time to within the boundaries of the certificate: date 0216183617 Untar tar -zxf node-v6.9.5-linux-x86.tar.gz [$[Get Code]] Run it: root@edison:~# . / node-v6.9.5-linux-x86 / bin / node --version v6.9.5 [$[Get Code]] Install it: mv node-v6.9.5-li

v6.9.5 [$[Get Code]] Install it: mv node-v6.9.5-linux-x86 / usr / local cd / usr / local ln -s node-v6.9.5-linux-x86 node cd bin ln -s .. / node / bin /* . [$[Get Code]] npm fails with cert problem. ### accessorInvokeSSH: Ignore messages like: 'npm

## accessorInvokeSSH: Ignore messages like: 'npm WARN enoent ENOENT: no such file or directory, open cg/RampJSTestDisplay/package.json' npm ERR ! Linux 3.10.17-yocto-standard npm ERR ! argv "/usr/local/node-v6.9.5-linux-x86/bin/node" "/usr/local/bi

cal/node-v6.9.5-linux-x86/bin/node" "/usr/local/bin/npm" "install" "@terraswarm/accessors" "forever" npm ERR ! node v6.9.5 npm ERR ! npm v3.10.10 npm ERR ! code CERT_NOT_YET_VALID npm ERR ! certificate is not yet valid npm ERR ! npm ERR ! If you nee

te is not yet valid npm ERR ! npm ERR ! If you need help , you may report this error at: npm ERR ! < https: // github.com / npm / npm / issues > npm ERR ! Please include the following file with any support request: npm ERR ! / home / sbuser / cg / np
